title: Desmotrichum scopa
taxonomy: Desmotrichum scopa is classified as a species of moss in the family Polytrichaceae, commonly known as the haircap mosses. This plant is a member of the class Bryopsida, which comprises all mosses. The family Polytrichaceae is a large and diverse group of mosses, with many species found in a wide range of habitats. Desmotrichum scopa is native to tropical and subtropical regions, where it grows in humid environments. Further classification of Desmotrichum scopa can be broken down into the order Polytrichales, and the genus Desmotrichum.
